videos.headline: Trey Lance refuses to go down on tackle-breaking TD run
videos.description: North Dakota State QB Trey Lance takes off on a designed run and breaks several tackles on his way to a 54-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trey Lance refuses to go down on tackle-breaking TD run) 2020/10/3 ESHEET
